query:
SELECT 
  p.code as phase,
  p.title as phaseName,
  p.year,
  COUNT(w.id) as workCount
FROM phases p
LEFT JOIN works w ON p.id = w.phaseId
GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.title, p.year
ORDER BY p.sortOrder;
